BuoySnapshot.title: Buoy Snapshot
BuoySnapshot.description: A record of buoy conditions at a specific point in time.

buoyId.description: The unique identifier for the buoy (e.g., 'Sammamish')

timestamp.description: The time the data was recorded by the sensor

recordedAt.description: The time the snapshot was saved to our database

/buoy_snapshots/{snapshotId}.description: Collection of historical buoy data snapshots.
